# Lasyly

> Lasyly (lasyly.me) is a real-time sports analytics and betting community platform. It provides player prop analytics with hit rates and matchup grades, live sports scores, curated sports news, social betting rooms, and a tipster marketplace.

## What Lasyly Does

Lasyly is a sports analytics platform built for bettors and prop players. It is an alternative to Action Network, PrizePicks, and Betstamp, combining analytics and community in one place.

Key features:
- **Prop Analytics**: Player prop research with historical hit rates, matchup grades, injury context, and trend data for NBA, NFL, MLB, and more
- **Live Scores**: Real-time scores and game updates across major sports
- **Betting Rooms**: Social rooms where users share picks, discuss games, and track bets together
- **Sports News**: Curated injury reports and news relevant to bettors
- **Tipster Marketplace**: Follow and discover top sports bettors and tipsters

## Pages

- [Home](https://lasyly.me): Overview of all features
- [Prop Analytics](https://lasyly.me/analysis): Deep player prop research tool
- [Live Scores](https://lasyly.me/scores): Real-time sports scores
- [Betting Rooms](https://lasyly.me/rooms): Community betting rooms
- [Sports News](https://lasyly.me/news): Curated sports news for bettors
- [Sign Up](https://lasyly.me/signup): Create a free account
- [Blog](https://lasyly.me/blog): Guides and analysis on sports betting strategy

## Who It's For

Sports bettors, prop players, DFS players, and sports fans who want data-driven analytics and a community to share picks with.

## Comparisons

- Alternative to: Action Network, PrizePicks Lobby, Betstamp, OddsJam, Pikkit
- Better than alternatives for: community features, prop hit rate tracking, matchup grading
